one_time_description: Province of BC - ITA deferred revenue of $10,130,120 recognized in full during the year, driving large surplus
economic_notes: Nation holds interests in a wide range of business enterprises including marina, forestry, fishing licences, environmental assessments, shopping centres, rock hauling, carbon credits, grizzly bear tours, and real estate. GBE total revenue $45.2M, net income $11.9M for 2024. Nation contingently liable for $8.9M in member home loans, $15.4M Discovery Harbour Shopping Centre mortgage, $128K member home loans, and $2.875M Discovery Crescent Shopping Centre mortgage.
notes: Large surplus of $23.7M driven primarily by recognition of $10.13M Province of BC ITA deferred revenue. Nation has complex structure with 4 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 20 GBE/partnership interests accounted for by modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,701,195 + Ottawa Trust $9,249 + CMHC $90,245 + FNHA $1,126,189 + Province of BC $12,145,307 + School District 72 $29,857 + Taxation $1,720,880 = $20,822,922 (note: Taxation $1,720,880 may be own-source; excluding taxation OSR adjusted accordingly). Investments in GBEs increased significantly from $36.1M to $56.4M largely due to new La-kwa sa muqw Forestry LP investment of $12.2M and Discovery Harbour Shopping Centre increase of $7.2M.
